title: Lead Nurture Sequence Logic Builder for Demand Gen Teams
description: Demand generation managers get a visual branching framework to map nurture paths by persona, funnel stage, and engagement score so no lead falls into a dead sequence.
gumroad_description:
LEAD NURTURE SEQUENCE LOGIC BUILDER FOR DEMAND GEN TEAMS

Your nurture sequences are leaking leads because you're treating every prospect like they're in the same stage, with the same needs, at the same temperature.

This framework fixes that. It's a visual branching system that maps exactly where each lead goes based on their persona, where they are in your funnel, and how engaged they actually are. No more guessing. No more dead sequences where leads go to sit.

WHO THIS IS FOR

— Demand gen managers running 3+ nurture campaigns who need a system that scales without adding chaos
— Marketing ops leads tasked with improving nurture performance metrics without rebuilding everything from scratch
— Revenue teams frustrated that leads enter sequences but never progress, and nobody knows why

WHAT'S INSIDE

— Logic tree template showing persona-based branching so each audience gets the right message at the right time
— Engagement scoring decision points that automatically route cold, warm, and hot leads into their own tracks
— Funnel stage mapping so leads don't get awareness content when they're evaluating vendors
— Real-world sequence examples you can copy and adapt in 15 minutes
— Quick-reference decision matrix for when to loop, advance, or pause a lead

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
